Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the request limit for ordered lists in data stores with a universe filter applied.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data management efficiency, allowing for better game performance and data retrieval.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Defines how many requests a player can make to the data store for ordered lists, filtered by universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances data management and reduces server load for games with many players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limits on data requests for specific game universes.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data retrieval for players, especially in large games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of read requests per player for data stores with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps maintain game stability by preventing excessive data requests from individual players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the limits on data store requests for removing items with a universe filter.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows for more efficient data management, improving game performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing server load from excessive data store requests.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Imposes a limit on data store requests based on universe filtering.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair use of data storage, improving game performance for players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreOrderedWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of ordered write requests per player to a specified amount.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces server strain and improves overall game performance for all players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a fixed limit on the number of requests for standard data stores.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage resources, preventing overload and improving stability.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardListPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many data requests a player can make within a universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Prevents overload and ensures fair access to data for all players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Improves data management efficiency, ensuring faster access to game data.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardReadPerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Limits the number of data store read requests per player based on the universe they are in.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing server load and ensuring fair access to data for all players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemoveFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Allows developers to manage player data more flexibly, improving game functionality.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardRemovePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter
Added_Other.mechanism: Removes the limit on how many data requests a player can make in a universe.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to save and load more data without hitting restrictions.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWriteFixedRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Ensures fair usage of data storage, preventing overload and maintaining game performance.

Added_Other.name: DFIntDataStoreStandardWritePerPlayerRequestLimit_UniverseFilter

Added_Other.purpose: Helps manage server performance by preventing excessive data writes from players in a single game.

Removed_Graphics.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing loading times for textures.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAXMutedErrorLoggingForCategorySelection_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Disables logging of certain errors related to category selection in the system.
Added_Other.purpose: Reduces clutter in error reports, making it easier for developers to focus on important issues.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Enables dynamic retrieval of the Git hash for version control in scripts.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers keep track of changes and updates, leading to better game stability.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings handle timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the display of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Uses a specific string format for version control in the codebase.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reliability of code updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance for displaying time-related information.
